away.source: MLB game logs + Baseball Savant date-bounded plate appearances + FanGraphs wRC+

home.source: MLB game logs + Baseball Savant date-bounded plate appearances + FanGraphs wRC+

alerts.title: WEATHER PENDING
alerts.summary: Game-time weather has not been imported.

positives.title: TEX CONTROLLED TRAFFIC

intelligence_meta.fip: calculated from MLB component stats; constant configurable
intelligence_meta.xfip: calculated from air outs using configurable league HR/FB
intelligence_meta.wrc_plus: FanGraphs team leaderboard feed; exact active filters
intelligence_meta.rank_policy: best value receives rank 1; coverage stored per rank
